inputs.label: Systolic Blood Pressure
inputs.businessContext: Measured systolic pressure in the brachial artery using a validated oscillometric device.

businessContext_i18n.en: Measured systolic pressure in the brachial artery using a validated oscillometric device.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Geçerli bir osilometrik cihaz kullanılarak brakial arterde ölçülen sistolik basınç.

inputs.label: Diastolic Blood Pressure
inputs.businessContext: Measured diastolic pressure, Korotkoff phase V.

businessContext_i18n.en: Measured diastolic pressure, Korotkoff phase V.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ölçülen diyastolik basınç, Korotkoff faz V.

inputs.label: Resting Heart Rate
inputs.businessContext: Palpated or electronically measured pulse rate per minute, at rest for at least 5 minutes.

businessContext_i18n.en: Palpated or electronically measured pulse rate per minute, at rest for at least 5 minutes.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Palpasyonla veya elektronik olarak ölçülen dakikadaki nabız sayısı, en az 5 dakika dinlenme sonrası.

inputs.label: Patient Age
inputs.businessContext: Age of the patient for normalization of expected pulse pressure.

businessContext_i18n.en: Age of the patient for normalization of expected pulse pressure.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Beklenen nabız basıncının normalizasyonu için hastanın yaşı.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
